title: Senior Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
